summary: Comprehensive testing of Class Structure, Onboarding Wizard, Student Edit, and Audit Logs completed. All 21 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED.

features_tested.details: 16 classes displayed with sections, student counts, and capacity bars. Summary shows 16 Total Classes, 44 Total Sections, 7 Total Students
Add Class button visible for admin, opens dialog with class name, display name, and section editor
Edit icon on class cards opens edit dialog. Can modify sections and teacher assignments
Clicking chevron on a section shows student list dialog (e.g., 'Nursery - Section A, 2 students enrolled')
New Admission button on Students page opens onboarding wizard with step indicator
Form accepts first name, last name, gender, DOB, email, phone, address, parent details. Clicking Next creates onboarding application

features_tested.feature: Onboarding Step 2 - Class/Section with seat availability
features_tested.details: Class and section dropdowns work. Shows 'Seat Availability' card with progress bar (e.g., 1/45 students)
Shows Admission Summary (student name, class, seats available) and Fee Breakdown section with total fee
Shows 'Admission Successful!' with admission number (SFS20260007) and parent credentials (email + temp password)
Edit dialog shows editable fields: email, phone, address, class, section, roll number, parent info
Admission number is displayed but NOT in an editable input. Shows as static text: 'Admission No: SFS20260001'
Saving student edit creates audit log entry (verified via API test)
GET /api/audit-logs returns entries, can filter by entity_type, requires admin role

features_tested.feature: Section filter uses new class structure format
features_tested.details: Sections in classes are objects with section_name, capacity, student_count. Filter dropdowns work correctly
Registration page shows 'Account Type: Parent Account' (not a dropdown). Message: 'Staff & teacher accounts are created by the school admin.'
Invalid class or section transfer rejected with 400 error
Duplicate student (same name + DOB) in onboarding pipeline is rejected
When parent_email provided during onboarding, parent account is auto-created with temp password shown in Step 4

critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly - no issues found
Onboarding flow properly validates seat capacity before allowing admission
Audit log system tracks all critical changes (student onboard, update, class changes)
Immutable fields (admission_number, student_id) properly protected in update endpoint
Parent account auto-creation working with temp password generation
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple onboarding applications and students via wizard. Admission numbers: SFS20260006, SFS20260007, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete class structure, onboarding wizard, student edit, and audit log testing done. All features working correctly. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_class_onboarding.py can be reused for regression testing. Stripe payment and SendGrid email are MOCKED.
